<script type="rocketlazyloadscript">
(function(){
  function setupVideoLazyPlay(){
    const videos = document.querySelectorAll('video[preload="none"]');

    const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        const v = entry.target;

        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          // Inicia reproducción cuando entra a pantalla
          v.play().catch(()=>{});
        } else {
          // Pausa cuando sale de pantalla
          v.pause();
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.6 });

    videos.forEach(v => io.observe(v));
  }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', setupVideoLazyPlay);
  window.addEventListener('load', setupVideoLazyPlay);
})();
</script>

    const spv1024 = Math.min(3, total);

    const sw1 = new Swiper(el, {
      slidesPerView: spv1024,
      spaceBetween: 20,
      loop: total > spv1024,
      watchOverflow: true,
      navigation: { nextEl: '.lfd1-next', prevEl: '.lfd1-prev' },
      autoplay: { delay: 8000, disableOnInteraction: false },
      breakpoints: {
        0:    { slidesPerView: spv0,    loop: total > spv0 },
        768:  { slidesPerView: spv768,  loop: total > spv768 },
        1024: { slidesPerView: spv1024, loop: total > spv1024 }

    });

    setTimeout(() => sw1.update(), 300);

    setTimeout(() => sw2.update(), 300);

  })();

});
